examples: Hold him by the nose, dearie, then he'll splutter and wake up.
There you go, dearie; that's Baby B, now take him away and leave me to chat to his Excellency.
The "old lady" was clearly shaken by the sudden skid, "I didn't see anything dearie, " she said.
When federal judge Raymond Dearie asked why Dworkin misled investors, Dworkin implied the purpose was to convince them not to redeem their investment in an NIR Group fund.
Oh dearie me, this is very embarrassing indeed.
